summary: Mobile/Tablet UX overhaul verified successfully. All responsive breakpoints working correctly: Mobile (390x844) shows 2 CTAs with View Projects hidden, Tablet (768x1024) and Desktop (1920x800) show all 3 CTAs. Hero heading large on mobile, cookie consent properly positioned, mobile tab bar shows on mobile/tablet but hidden on desktop, AURA avatar visible on desktop.

mobile_390x844.mobile_tab_bar: PASS - 5 tabs visible (Home, Builder, Projects, Services, Contact)
mobile_390x844.cookie_consent: PASS - visible with pb-[84px] clearance from tab bar

desktop_1920x800.full_nav_menu: PASS - visible with all navigation items

HeroCurator.tsx.line_139: 'hidden sm:block' correctly hides View Projects on mobile (<640px)
HeroCurator.tsx.line_103: text-4xl on mobile, scales up with sm:text-5xl, md:text-5xl, lg:text-6xl, xl:text-7xl
HeroCurator.tsx.line_114: flex-col gap-3 sm:flex-row layout for CTAs - working correctly

CookieConsent.tsx.line_56: pb-[84px] lg:pb-4 provides clearance above mobile tab bar

context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile/tablet UX overhaul complete. Key responsive classes: 'hidden sm:block' for View Projects CTA, 'lg:hidden' for mobile tab bar, pb-[84px] lg:pb-4 for cookie consent clearance. All 3 viewports tested and passing.
